label: Home
story_beat: What this project is, why it exists, who's working on it. Cards: rulebook stats, last build, last test pass-rate, active spokes.

label: Rulebook
story_beat: The business semantics of the project — every table, field, formula, and sample row.

label: Entities
story_beat: List all entities. Click one to drill in to its fields, sample data, and computed columns.

label: Formulas
story_beat: All calculated fields in one place. Click one to see its DAG (inputs → output) live from the rulebook.

label: Relationships
story_beat: FK graph of the project. Hover a node to highlight its inbound and outbound relationships.

label: Sample Data
story_beat: What the project looks like populated. Editable for developers; read-only for viewers.

label: Substrates
story_beat: Every output substrate this project generates (Python, Go, Postgres, Excel, OWL, etc.). Click one to see the generated source and the conformance status.

label: Add Tool
story_beat: Pick from the catalog of 15+ transpilers and install one into the active project. Same code path as `effortless -install` on the CLI.

label: Builds
story_beat: Build history: when, what changed, which substrates regenerated, how long. Developers can trigger a build here.

label: Tests
story_beat: Conformance matrix: which substrate computed which test case correctly. Drill in to see input → expected → actual per substrate.

label: Input Spokes
story_beat: Where edits come from: admin portal, Airtable, LLM, manual JSON. Pull / push controls live here.

label: Users
story_beat: Default dev/test users from the rulebook + their roles.

label: Tech Tools
story_beat: Developer-only escape hatches. Raw Postgres, proxy logs, file system, manual injection. Not part of the daily workflow.

label: Postgres Explorer
story_beat: Raw editor-DB browser: run SQL, inspect rows, drop/reset DB.

label: ssotme-proxy
story_beat: Live proxy status: registered routes, recent calls, response sizes, last error per route.

label: Files
story_beat: Project filesystem browser. View any generated or hand-written file in the active project.

label: Rulebook JSON
story_beat: Raw rulebook JSON viewer/editor. Save here goes through the same write-through invariant as the UI.

label: Reset Editor
story_beat: Drop the editor Postgres DB and re-bootstrap from rulebook JSON. Safe — JSON is SSoT.
